jsonLd.name: Markdown Reader

jsonLd.browserRequirements: Requires a modern browser with JavaScript enabled
featureList: Open any .md file in the browser

Export to PDF, HTML and clean Markdown

mainEntity.name: How is Markdown Reader different from a regular Markdown editor?

acceptedAnswer.text: Markdown Reader is a reader-first markdown reader. It renders any .md file as a clean web document while keeping the original file as the single source of truth.

mainEntity.name: Can I use Markdown Reader as a markdown viewer online without installing anything?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Markdown Reader runs entirely in the browser at markdownreader.xyz, so you can open .md files instantly on any modern desktop browser.

mainEntity.name: Does Markdown Reader support KaTeX and Mermaid?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Markdown Reader supports GFM tables, syntax-highlighted code, KaTeX formulas and Mermaid diagrams out of the box.

mainEntity.name: Is my file uploaded to the cloud?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Markdown Reader is a local-first markdown reader; files are read in your browser and only leave the device when you explicitly export.

mainEntity.name: Can I export from Markdown Reader to PDF or HTML?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Markdown Reader exports polished PDF and HTML, plus a clean Markdown copy if you need to share the source.

mainEntity.name: Is Markdown Reader a good Obsidian or Typora alternative?

acceptedAnswer.text: For reading long documents, yes. Markdown Reader is not a knowledge base; it is a focused markdown reader for individual files.
Once loaded, Markdown Reader can open and render local .md files without a network connection.

mainEntity.name: Markdown Reader 和普通 Markdown 编辑器有什么区别？

acceptedAnswer.text: Markdown Reader 是一款以阅读为核心的 Markdown 阅读器，把 .md 文件渲染成整洁的网页文档，同时保持源文件不被改写。

mainEntity.name: Markdown Reader 算在线 Markdown 阅读器吗？需要安装吗？

acceptedAnswer.text: 是。Markdown Reader 是浏览器内运行的在线 Markdown 阅读器，访问 markdownreader.xyz 即可使用，无需安装任何客户端。

mainEntity.name: 这款 Markdown 阅读器支持哪些语法？

acceptedAnswer.text: Markdown Reader 原生支持 GFM、表格、代码高亮、KaTeX 数学公式与 Mermaid 图表。

mainEntity.name: 文件会被上传到云端吗？

acceptedAnswer.text: 不会。Markdown Reader 是本地优先的 Markdown 阅读器，文件在浏览器内读取，只有在你主动导出时才离开本机。

mainEntity.name: Markdown 阅读器能导出 PDF 或 HTML 吗？

acceptedAnswer.text: 可以。Markdown Reader 支持导出排版良好的 PDF、HTML，以及一份干净的 Markdown 副本。

mainEntity.name: 可以替代 Obsidian 或 Typora 用来读长文档吗？

acceptedAnswer.text: 用来读单篇长文档可以。Markdown Reader 不是知识库，而是面向单文件的专注型 Markdown 阅读器。

mainEntity.name: Markdown 阅读器可以离线使用吗？

acceptedAnswer.text: 页面加载完成后，这款 Markdown 阅读器可在无网络环境下打开并渲染本地 .md 文件。
